'''AK-Prime''' was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] found in the crater of a volcano on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was there that he defended [[HK-47]] from a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]], though he eventually failed and was destroyed. AK-Prime was similar to his lesser, but still effective, [[AK-3 "Reaper"]], [[AK-1A "Hammer"]], [[CWW8 Battle Droid]]s.

==Equipment==
AK-Prime sported a wide range of weaponry, including Republic Sfor Carbines, a plasma flamethrower, and rocket launchers. He also had the ability to send out a shockwave, knocking down his opponents. This proved to be a nuisance to spacers who tried, successfully, to stop him.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''
